_note: Refreshed by the refresh-sports-feed scheduled task. Each item is {headline, url, source, published (ISO8601), snark}. Snark voice: Barstool-adjacent guy-at-the-bar, crass, horny, cocky, zero filler. One sentence. No slurs, no punching down at specific real people in a harmful way. Punch sideways (at media, front offices, rival fanbases) and up (at ownership). Keep it Boston.

items.headline: Red Sox 6, Twins 8: Bullpen spoils Tolle's stellar start in Friday loss
items.snark: Tolle threw his ass off for six innings and the pen took one look at a lead and said nah we good fam.

items.headline: Trevor Story undergoes sports hernia surgery, out 6-10 weeks
items.snark: Third surgery in five years for a guy making 140 million dollars through 2027, what a steal.

items.headline: Red Sox president Sam Kennedy says team looking to add bat earlier than ever
items.snark: Front office finally realizes you need offense to score runs, Nobel Prize nominations open at noon.

items.headline: Series Preview: Twins at Red Sox, Round 2 for 2026
items.snark: Sox are 12-10 since firing Cora which looks better if you squint real hard and ignore the standings.
